daily.baseball_pulse:
MY TEAM

No relevant news for your roster today.

MY PROSPECTS

No prospect news today.

AROUND THE LEAGUE

The Braves placed Raisel Iglesias on the injured list, though early reports indicate he avoided structural damage in his shoulder. Juan Soto is expected to return to the Mets lineup Wednesday after missing time, providing a potential spark to a team that has lost 12 straight games. The Red Sox are calling up Eduardo Rivera, their No. 26 prospect, for his major league debut. The Giants placed Daniel Susac on the IL and selected Eric Haase to the active roster.

BASEBALL TODAY

The Cubs extended their winning streak to seven games with Nico Hoerner continuing to rake at .326 with another homer. Shea Langeliers homered for the second straight day as the Athletics moved into first place, while the White Sox erupted with back-to-back-to-back home runs for the first time in six years in a dominant victory.
